first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10) and the core reasoning for the low score is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the central issue: the candidate's experience is in TypeScript/Node.js, while the role requires modern C++ or Rust, a skill the candidate has not used in nearly a decade. The minor differences in phrasing for strengths and concerns fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or penalties based on the change of all work locations to Brazil.
